Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}When I'm with you, I sometimes find myself wishing for the clock to stop moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}What a peculiar feeling. Could it be...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Um... Sorry. I was just talking to myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's nothing! Come on, don't look at me like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You're going to see how flushed my face is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Do you mind if we go somewhere else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Mitsuru until night fell.[n]{f 1 1}
